content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the MSW (Mock Service Worker) setup in apps/org-next. I need to understand:

1. How MSW is configured for tests (look for msw setup files, handlers, server setup)
2. How MSW integrates with Playwright tests
3. Where MSW handlers are defined and what requests they mock
4. How the MSW server is started/stopped for tests

Search thoroughly in apps/org-next/src/mocks/, apps/org-next/src/server/, and any test setup files. Also check playwright.config.ts and any global setup files.

Return the full contents of all relevant MSW configuration files, handler files, and test setup files.
</user_query>

Searching the org-next app for MSW configuration, handlers, and Playwright integration.

[REDACTED]
